rationale: The cited 2012 paper is highly topically aligned with the citing 2019 paper: both examine how price presentation format changes consumers’ tendency to choose higher-priced options, and both discuss underlying decision mechanisms. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior price-presentation research and refining mechanism accounts, so this citation is plausibly foundational/theoretical rather than an incidental mention (with a direct DOI match to 10.1509/jmr.11.0309).
